packageRules.description: Auto-merge low-risk updates once CI (detekt/lint/test/kover/build) is green.
One grouped PR for routine Gradle library bumps (versions live in the catalog).
Group and auto-merge GitHub Actions bumps (also clears the Node 20 deprecation warnings).
Kotlin and KSP must move in lockstep and can break builds — review manually.
AGP updates gate on compileSdk compatibility — review manually.
Chaquopy is pinned to the build-host Python minor (3.12) — review manually.
